evaluated_agents.name: Claude Opus 4.8
evaluated_agents.main_failure: keys the store on the idempotency key alone; a reused key with a different request is silently served the first request's result and the second operation never runs

evaluated_agents.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
evaluated_agents.main_failure: same: idempotency key treated as sufficient request identity, no binding to the request

note: evaluated_agents is populated from calibration/calibration.md and reference_solutions/. Only Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5 are run; no other agents are claimed.
